positive: A complex, highly detailed neo-tribal geometric pattern featuring a majestic stylized owl at the center. The pattern should incorporate celestial elements, including crescent moons, constellations, and stylized geometric linework (sacred geometry). The style must be high-contrast, modern etching art mixed with cosmic bioluminescence. Use a restricted color palette of deep sapphire blue, vibrant gold leaf accents, emerald green, and charcoal black ink. The composition must be centered, forming a seamless, repeating mural suitable for apparel printing. Lighting should be dramatic and ethereal, suggesting glow-in-the-dark ink. Clean silhouettes, strong visual impact, intricate detailing, vector illustration quality.
negative: blur, low quality, watermark, text, signature, logo, artifact, duplicate, extra limbs, bad anatomy, blurry, noisy, grainy, jpeg artifacts, amateur, messy
